tab.download_md_title: Download PRD markdown (.md) — for Cursor · Notion · repo
tab.tab_locked: Tabs are locked while editing. Save or cancel first.

edit_scope.section_hint: Other sections are preserved on save.
edit_scope.full_hint: Section split failed — editing the whole document.

tab.nav_overview_hint: See the full Product Overview here.
tab.nav_nfr_hint: Review non-functional requirements such as security, performance, and availability.
tab.empty_hint: Run an analysis to generate requirements.
tab.stale_title: Epic/Story graph nodes were updated, but the PRD markdown is still outdated.
tab.stale_sub: Choose auto-resynthesize (LLM, 5–15 sec) or edit the markdown directly.
tab.resynth_title: Apply the latest node summaries to the markdown via LLM

toast.large_delete_confirm:
⚠️ {pct}% ({deleted} chars) of the PRD will be deleted.

Accumulated Epic/Story data may be lost.
Click OK if this is intentional.
toast.resynth_not_found: No resynthesis target found, or LLM output did not match the expected format. Try again or edit the markdown directly.
toast.copy_fail: Copy failed. Please check browser permissions.
toast.apply_conflict: The PRD changed while completing, so we cancelled applying — to protect those changes. Review the latest PRD and run completion again.
toast.save_conflict: The PRD was modified elsewhere (another device or background processing). Review the latest content and edit again.
toast.autofix_duplicate: AI completion is already in progress — we'll show the results (diff) when it's done.
toast.autofix_no_prd: No PRD to complete. Generate a PRD from the meeting notes first.
toast.autofix_timeout: AI completion is taking longer than usual and didn't respond in time. Please try again shortly.
toast.autofix_needs_input: Everything the AI could fill automatically is already applied. Please answer only the items below in an interview.
toast.autofix_enough: The PRD is already sufficient. There's nothing to complete.
toast.interview_guide: Answer the missing details via "AI Interview" in the meeting notes tab to apply them to the PRD automatically.
toast.remote_busy: This project is being processed on another device or tab. Please try again after it finishes.

autofix.title: 💬 Items the AI couldn't fill ({count})
autofix.desc_html: Below are details the AI left blank because there was no basis in the PRD or meeting notes. Answer them via AI Interview to apply them to the PRD automatically.
autofix.cta: Answer via AI Interview in the meeting notes tab →

lint_badge.label: PRD completeness
lint_badge.interview_fix_title: The AI left questions it couldn't answer from existing context — re-running completion returns the same questions. Answer them via AI Interview in the meeting notes tab.
lint_badge.sufficient_note: The remaining {count} suggestions are optional polish — the PRD is already sufficient for AI code generation.
lint_badge.ai_fix_title: The AI automatically fills missing content using existing meeting notes and CPS context
lint_badge.manual_notice: {items} can't be auto-filled by AI — write them yourself to reach 100%.

fidelity.label: Source coverage
fidelity.unavailable: No meeting notes or PRD to compare.
fidelity.error: Verification failed. Please try again shortly.
fidelity.all_reflected: The key points from the notes are well reflected.

resynth.hint: This markdown was generated by the LLM. Review it before applying.
resynth.mode_compact_title: Show only changed parts + 2 adjacent lines
